title: Full-Time Tutor (Choa Chu Kang)
description:
Full-Time Tutor (Tampines) 

📍 Location: TutorJohn Learning Centre – Tampines
💼 Position: Full-Time Primary/ Secondary Tutor (Multi-Disciplinary)
💰 Salary: $3,000 – $4,200/month (Based on Experience + Performance Bonuses)
🗓 Work Days: 4 Weekdays + 1 Weekend
🕒 Hours:
• Weekdays: 1:00 PM – 9:30 PM / 2:00 PM – 10:30 PM
• Weekends: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM

🌟 About TutorJohn Learning Centre

TutorJohn is a fast-growing tuition brand with 3 branches across Singapore – two in Choa Chu Kang and one in Tampines. We provide English, Math, Science, and Chinese lessons and focus strongly on building student confidence through clear teaching systems.

We are hiring a Full-Time Primary Tutor (Multi-Disciplinary) who is comfortable supporting students across subjects, with a focus on the Primary & Secondary level.

✨ Why Join Us?

🔹 Small Class Sizes – Max 6 students per class
🔹 Stable Full-Time Career Track – grow into Assistant Centre Manager
🔹 Performance Bonuses – increments tied to results and contribution
🔹 Strong Team Support – shared materials + consistent teaching structure
🔹 Hands-On Training & Mentorship – improve pedagogy and delivery quality

👩‍🏫 Your Key Responsibilities

✅ Teach Primary & Secondary Subjects (Multi-Discipline)
• Teach up to 3 classes/day
• Conduct lessons aligned to latest MOE syllabus
• Support Primary & Secondary students in structured improvement for:

  • English (writing + comprehension)

  • Math (concept mastery + problem solving)

  • Science (foundation + answering techniques)

✅ Student Progress & Parent Confidence
• Run short assessments and identify learning gaps
• Adjust teaching strategy based on student needs and performance trends

✅ Operational Support
• Lesson preparation, resources, scheduling support
• Assist in smooth day-to-day centre operations

✅ Leadership Growth Opportunities
• Work closely with the team and John
• Progression pathway to Assistant Centre Manager for strong performers

🎯 Who We’re Looking For

✔ Diploma/Degree holders (Education-related fields a plus)
✔ Preferably 1+ year teaching experience (fresh grads welcome)
✔ Strong fundamentals in Primary & Secondary subjects
✔ Confident classroom control + clear explanation skills
✔ Responsible, consistent, and committed to student outcomes
✔ Able to commit until end of academic year

🚀 Apply now:
Register here (5 minutes): https://tinyurl.com/TuitionCentreJobRegistration
Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
TutorJohn Learning Centre (TJLC) offers small group tuition services for Primary and Secondary Levels. A team of passionate and experience tutors constantly bringing learning to the next level for our students. 


TJLC keep up with the online interactive live lessons and pushing the learning curve to match the needs of the students and parents.
